comment: I used to experience severe dental anxiety, but Dr. Jenkins and her team completely put me at ease. The cleanest and most professional practice I have ever visited!
The clear aligner treatment completely changed my smile confidence. Highly recommend this practice for anyone looking for exceptional, friendly results.
Brought my kids here for their routine cleanings. Marcus was incredibly gentle, friendly, and patient. Finding a family-friendly dentist is a huge relief!
Excellent experience with my dental implant surgery. Dr. Thorne explained every step thoroughly and the recovery was much faster than I originally expected.
The reception staff are remarkably welcoming and helpful with insurance processing. The clinic is beautiful, ultra-modern, and exceptionally clean.
